function.name: check_inbox
function.description: List recent incoming emails from Zoho Mail inbox. Use this to monitor new mail.

limit.description: Number of emails to return (max 50). Default 20.

function.name: check_sent
function.description: List recent outgoing (sent) emails from Zoho Mail.

function.name: read_email
function.description: Read the full content of a specific email.

message_id.description: The messageId value from check_inbox or check_sent

function.name: search_email
function.description: Search Zoho Mail emails by keyword, sender, or subject.

function.name: check_storage
function.description: Check Zoho Mail storage usage: used MB, total MB, percentage used, and warning status.

function.name: backup_emails
function.description: Backup emails from a Zoho Mail folder to a local JSONL file. Returns a summary with saved count and file path.

folder.description: Folder to backup: Inbox, Sent, Trash, etc. Default: Inbox

max_messages.description: Maximum number of messages to download. Default: 500

function.name: list_folders
function.description: List all Zoho Mail folders with their IDs and unread counts.

function.name: send_email
function.description: Send an email from the user's Zoho Mail account. Your signature is appended automatically unless signature is set to false.
